rationale: The cited paper is in a related methodological/theoretical area (dynamic advertising response, carryover, and media effectiveness), which could plausibly serve as prior-model background for the citing paper’s advertising-elasticity analysis. However, the available linkage is only a single DOI-level reference match with no in-text citation context, and the topical focus differs (multimedia synergy vs. intrayear demand-cycle effects on advertising/pricing), so the evidence is too sparse to confidently keep or drop.
